    14.Speaker 0: This one had the same problem as you. Attacked us in the woods together with some goblins.DrowDEN_Apprentice_HasMet

    ruletagtype rule

    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Drow
    This one had the same problem as you. Attacked us in the woods together with some goblins.

    Variant 2

    combine=0
    • Drow

                                                                                        381.Speaker 0: Without him here, the only treatment for an illithid tadpole is death. You're a risk to the people around you.

                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e31d36a2-340b-0a78-3451-57dce0d1b880Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h477f6e41g572ag4626ga6c6g927b8a83fd10Text UUID: 19d374a0-4302-5b82-a8ad-8ef9a596dde5Group ID: 4ba673fe-019a-6705-a949-f7fa9dc97986Group Index: 1
                                                                                        • +
                                                                                          38.Speaker 0: I'm truly, truly sorry. For what it's worth, the poison is painless. It'll be like going to sleep.

                                                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                                                              289.Speaker 0: Because you should all be changing - there should be a small army of mind flayers out there! But you're not. Weird powers aside, you seem perfectly normal.GLO_Halsin_Knows_StudiedTadpole00e35689-795d-442d-820c-371bd620abc0

                                                                                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                                                                                              settype Global

                                                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                                                270.Player: What do you mean 'should' be changing?

                                                                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a27cc0fe-b3c9-f20c-c2ff-3aedbebe6a15Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9c15234dge47cg4eaega067gbb513012b6baText UUID: aebe7d94-4660-4cc3-9c46-ac871e312395Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                                                                  317.Speaker 0: Mind flayers reproduce by infecting someone with their parasite. Seven gruesome days later, the victim transforms and a new mind flayer is born.

                                                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ba1d5285-d550-4df9-ee74-2fd9c0fe6c56Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hc92b0813g4db9g4aa9ga714g781f7e514941Text UUID: cbd5549e-75f8-44a6-8182-bd7a5bb8715eTimeline Phase Index: 57Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ba1d5285-d550-4df9-ee74-2fd9c0fe6c56Timeline Phase Duration: 13.78sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [401.15s-414.93s] | @ 401.15s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [401.15s-414.93s] | @ 405.14s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [401.15s-414.93s] | @ 408.55s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [401.15s-414.93s] | @ 410.45s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [401.15s-414.93s] | @ 413.41s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Group ID: ba1d5285-d550-4df9-ee74-2fd9c0fe6c56Group Index: 0
                                                                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                                                                    395.Speaker 0: The thing in your skull, though? It's different to anything in our records.

                                                                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ea8fb30b-9f68-40cf-f698-f25a8e9e9ab5Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h82adea27g89adg46a6g8778ge439eadf9cd9Text UUID: 7719808a-66af-446c-97f9-844d889c268cGroup ID: ba1d5285-d550-4df9-ee74-2fd9c0fe6c56Group Index: 1
                                                                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                                                                      416.Speaker 0: It's one of their worms, for sure, but this one gives you powers - telepathic connections. And it doesn't turn you into one of them.

                                                                                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f5f46ba6-2759-323b-347c-b2ce0db08444Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h5b2d4212gd988g4fdbg83b2gd740c7ac965eText UUID: 48294dd8-afa6-421b-a6eb-7445f7877fa3Timeline Phase Index: 29Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f5f46ba6-2759-323b-347c-b2ce0db08444Timeline Phase Duration: 11.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [214.37s-224.74s] | @ 216.56s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [214.37s-224.74s] | @ 218.8s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [214.37s-224.74s] | @ 221.12s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [214.37s-224.74s] | @ 223.66s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [214.37s-224.74s] | @ 224.04s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [214.37s-224.74s] | @ 224.26s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [214.37s-224.74s] | @ 224.3s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [214.37s-224.74s] | @ 224.52s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [226.03s-230.67s] | @ 226.03s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Group ID: f5f46ba6-2759-323b-347c-b2ce0db08444Group Index: 0
                                                                                                                                                      • +
                                                                                                                                                        309.Speaker 0: Not yet, anyhow.

                                                                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b6606558-8625-087b-129b-e4dc4bd80068Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hf28ace94g3e90g472cgb3e2g0b7f933355b0Text UUID: 4aa3e57f-a6ba-4b7a-ac25-7516a1dd561cGroup ID: f5f46ba6-2759-323b-347c-b2ce0db08444Group Index: 1
                                                                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                                                                          77.Player: So you think it's only a matter of time?

                                                                                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                                                                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 309386cb-9c8b-54aa-f151-739691b56c0dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h990b1492g34d9g40ffg89d1ga45c4c140058Text UUID: 63a653f8-bb72-43f4-8129-9b4d9b6d90f4Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                                                                            204.Speaker 0: Could be, but there's a lot we don't know. Infected - folks like you - have been converging on an old temple of Selûne, and I've no idea why.

                                                                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7b4d16de-5f0d-9127-86da-cd2d628697e5Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h95b43824gdde4g4335g9b21gf33bb7a0b4f8Text UUID: 7a87afd7-80ef-4a2a-9b9b-37744259f88dTimeline Phase Index: 27Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7b4d16de-5f0d-9127-86da-cd2d628697e5Timeline Phase Duration: 10.91sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [198.46s-209.37s] | @ 199.78s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [198.46s-209.37s] | @ 202.3s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [198.46s-209.37s] | @ 207.97s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [209.37s-214.37s] | @ 209.37s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)
                                                                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                                                                              51.Speaker 0: When Master Halsin heard the adventurers were heading that way, he saw a chance to get answers. Joined on the spot.

                                                                                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1ca6fcc6-ef98-b9e8-e29c-2bab74f2f38eSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hf75d7728g2ae3g4c13ga2cfga6595852a7e8Text UUID: e15a0e87-2c99-4f80-9460-3c01aaf588f1Timeline Phase Index: 71Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1ca6fcc6-ef98-b9e8-e29c-2bab74f2f38eTimeline Phase Duration: 12.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [534.63s-542.56s] | @ 534.63s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [534.63s-542.56s] | @ 538.22s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [534.63s-542.56s] | @ 542.09s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [542.56s-545.67s] | @ 543.72s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [542.56s-545.67s] | @ 544.81s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [545.67s-546.78s] | @ 545.72s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [545.67s-546.78s] | @ 545.98s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [545.67s-546.78s] | @ 546s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [545.67s-546.78s] | @ 546.49s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [545.67s-546.78s] | @ 546.69s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryGroup ID: 1ca6fcc6-ef98-b9e8-e29c-2bab74f2f38eGroup Index: 0
                                                                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                                                                139.Speaker 0: Whatever he found there, he didn't make it back.

                                                                                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 564db8c0-de6c-a220-3d9d-5732e51713c3Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: ha28ac4fag06d0g4a23g8a96g7b144b4fdc8bText UUID: 047c6889-6fa9-4b64-9874-d1737aafc5ddGroup ID: 1ca6fcc6-ef98-b9e8-e29c-2bab74f2f38eGroup Index: 1
                                                                                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                                                                                  385.Player: What do you want me to do?

                                                                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e4c9065d-d9dc-8820-46bb-c75bdbf2fb77Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h58b47ff3g33c4g4797g8dcdg408be8e70173Text UUID: 50619527-33c8-434a-8b4f-8fe83d6bb3a0Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                                                                                    242.Speaker 0: The thing is, I've sent birds to find him, but the place is rotten with goblins. None of us can even get close.

                                                                                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8eb2863b-7339-0d28-ca27-8d63b61389cdSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h80ec74bdg9cb8g4944g9526g0bd78b12383fText UUID: 67289c61-ba13-4f90-9800-f41e2a7ac904Timeline Phase Index: 16Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8eb2863b-7339-0d28-ca27-8d63b61389cdTimeline Phase Duration: 7.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [120.42s-127.78s] | @ 121.32s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [120.42s-127.78s] | @ 124s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [120.42s-127.78s] | @ 126.1s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [120.42s-127.78s] | @ 127.78s | speaker 7 | Thinking (4)
                                                                                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                                                                                      147.Speaker 0: You, though? You're one of them - technically speaking, I mean. They won't kill someone carrying their parasite.

                                                                                                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5d7596ee-2113-de7c-26a5-3085c2bf59adSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hcb7c6ea2g0ed6g4b37gb5f1g2776be482ccfText UUID: 3b607ad2-8fbf-45f8-a032-84ed1bff3db6Timeline Phase Index: 107Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5d7596ee-2113-de7c-26a5-3085c2bf59adTimeline Phase Duration: 7.37sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [797.24s-804.61s] | @ 797.24s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [797.24s-804.61s] | @ 798.6s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [797.24s-804.61s] | @ 800.62s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [797.24s-804.61s] | @ 803.73s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
                                                                                                                                                                      • +
                                                                                                                                                                        339.Speaker 0: If you can get Halsin out of there, we can discover what he learned. And perhaps he can save your life. How's that sound?96fcd78d-a71b-fe26-84bd-c0f59a85b60f_ToldFoundHalsin

                                                                                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                                                                                  110.Player: So? Go and get him.

                                                                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 40cf4121-ae82-e10c-d354-929477b08009Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbc32fbf0g61b9g4c8cg89f6gb7b46ccb5887Text UUID: 83242241-eaa1-47a7-a217-ab04265fe156Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                                                                                    290.Speaker 0: I've sent birds to find him, but the place is rotten with goblins. And if my birds can't get close, what chance do I have?

                                                                                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ac911e6d-90c1-4f61-4a6b-9f57de2f53d0Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hc9b98f42g16a1g4f41g91e4g56aad1d2e387Text UUID: 4c7afd7a-ed42-4f62-9197-b4775402edd0Timeline Phase Index: 9Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ac911e6d-90c1-4f61-4a6b-9f57de2f53d0Timeline Phase Duration: 8.79sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [56.53s-65.32s] | @ 58.59s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [56.53s-65.32s] | @ 61.41s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [56.53s-65.32s] | @ 64.06s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [65.32s-68.69s] | @ 65.32s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1
                                                                                                                                                                    • See Node 147 (Speaker 0) You, though? You're one of them - technically speaking, I mean. They won't kill someone carrying their parasite.
                                                                                                                                                                • +
                                                                                                                                                                  358.Player: You think he's still alive?!96fcd78d-a71b-fe26-84bd-c0f59a85b60f_ToldFoundHalsin

                                                                                                                                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                                                                                                                                  checktype Local
                                                                                                                                                                  • 96fcd78d-a71b-fe26-84bd-c0f59a85b60f_ToldFoundHalsin {bbb23987-17aa-7d01-df2a-b277ee12dc9a} = False

                                                                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d4c05f94-d779-70d9-d8ed-7aba7fa6ad85Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha4fbfe65g9ee7g4ebfgb83ag67546da3404fText UUID: 5f4ee6e2-9434-45df-85f8-bc7f66b040efShow Once: True
                                                                                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                                                                                    163.Speaker 0: I think so. I hope so. I've sent birds to find him, but they can't get close without goblins trying to shoot them down.

                                                                                                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6778b6e5-b1cd-e412-bbc4-a01dbcce5711Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hdef90e0eg7a05g47e5gaceag69e540872f6dText UUID: 279d9616-0985-4076-9270-e5b25e38d4b9Timeline Phase Index: 102Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6778b6e5-b1cd-e412-bbc4-a01dbcce5711Timeline Phase Duration: 7.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [762.35s-770.19s] | @ 762.35s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [762.35s-770.19s] | @ 764.02s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [762.35s-770.19s] | @ 765.77s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [762.35s-770.19s] | @ 768.21s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1
                                                                                                                                                                    • See Node 147 (Speaker 0) You, though? You're one of them - technically speaking, I mean. They won't kill someone carrying their parasite.
                                                                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                                                                          246.Player: That's... good news?

                                                                                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                                                                                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9235dd39-6553-7b01-2671-d38deaeaa739Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h405fba02g345fg41d0gb54cg20823bafe2e2Text UUID: abae48dd-a025-4f73-8cd9-508b85054352Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                                          • See Node 204 (Speaker 0) Could be, but there's a lot we don't know. Infected - folks like you - have been converging on an old temple of Selûne, and I've no idea why.
                                                                                                                                                        • +

                                                                                                                                                • +

                                                                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b6970e6d-ba31-e5cf-48f6-ea728a4aced5Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h88802400ge9f5g43f3ga3c8gff8081bbeda0Text UUID: d33e8171-476e-4f12-9315-d59001bf2e8cTimeline Phase Index: 30Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b6970e6d-ba31-e5cf-48f6-ea728a4aced5Timeline Phase Duration: 4.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [226.03s-230.67s] | @ 228.66s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [230.67s-232.2s] | @ 230.67s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)
                                                                                                                                                  • See Node 416 (Speaker 0) It's one of their worms, for sure, but this one gives you powers - telepathic connections.                                                                                                                                               • +
                                                                                                                                                278.Player: Just tell me if there's a cure or not.

                                                                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a5cca53c-bc60-d36d-d61d-bc04f72bc3c4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hee5fb84bg362bg4336gbfebgb6d672462653Text UUID: dc6773dd-2fe1-4a18-a938-9f5967abbdb5Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                                • +

                                                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                                                      195.Speaker 0: By rights your teeth should be falling out and your skin turning grey. I don't know why you haven't changed, but I can't risk you suddenly turning into a mind flayer.

                                                                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 759d3c80-0ab3-aa4b-96c8-9490177398f5Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h828db68ag93d2g43e8g9c49g722630999545Text UUID: 4306b6ec-17d0-4756-92eb-156b49f7d424Group ID: 3208725a-0194-8983-1555-551bdf636cf1Group Index: 1
                                                                                                                                      • •
                                                                                                                                        264.Speaker 0: Do whatever you need to, but we're not leaving this room until it's over. [End]

                                                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                            298.Speaker 0: The drow's tadpole was dormant, not dead. It didn't transform, but that's not to say it wouldn't have.

                                                                                                              3.Speaker 0: You know, I've spent my life treating folk and never once saw a mind flayer infection. Then suddenly there's dozens of you - maybe more.

                                                                                                          • +
